title.en: This time he could get some benefits, and Ye Ti...

content.en:
This time he could get some benefits, and Ye Tian didn't want to give up.

So, Ye Tian said: "Stone Dragon Demon Lord, if you want me to take refuge in you, this Infinite Resurrection Secret Technique is not enough, I need more benefits!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord's face changed, he didn't expect Ye Tian to be so greedy, the secret technique of infinite resurrection was enough to attract any half-step perfect controller, after all, who didn't want to be resurrected indefinitely?

As a result, Ye Tian still wanted benefits.

In fact, he only wanted to pay for the Infinite Resurrection Secret Technique, after all, this was an investment without capital, and he could control a demonic genius.

If you pay other resources, you will lose money.

However, when he thought of the benefits of controlling the demonic genius of the Daoless Tower, he hesitated for a moment and agreed.

"Okay, I can give you other benefits, but don't go too far, after all, infinite resurrection is already a secret technique that others can't imagine, and you have obtained the best treasure!" said the Stone Dragon Demon Lord.

"I still want more extreme things!" Ye Tian said.

"The Ultimate Thing!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord breathed a sigh of relief.

The things that made the extreme were of little use to him, so he was willing to give them, and if he wanted treasures that were still helpful to him, he was a little reluctant.

However, when he thought that Ye Tian was only a half-step perfect controller, how high could his vision be?

"I can give you the ultimate thing, but I won't meet you personally, otherwise if you betray me and bring you the powerhouse of the Daoless Tower, I will lose a lot. Therefore, I can only tell you about a treasure of resources that has the Extreme, and you can go there and collect the Extremes yourself!" said the Stone Dragon Demon Lord.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord told Ye Tian the location of that place, and it would take some time to enter there, and he would need to pass through a space-time gap before he could quickly get there.

And that location was named Luo Peng Valley by the Stone Dragon Demon Lord.

"When I go to the Lopeng Valley and find the ultimate thing, I will grant your request. Ye Tian said.

"Very good, I'll come back to you next time!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord spoke, and the projection of his will dissipated.

And not long after, Ye Tian annihilated this replica body and re-condensed another replica body.

In this way, the aura imprint left by the Stone Dragon Demon Lord in his copy body was erased.

......

Somewhere at the end of the world, a place of endless darkness.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord smiled slightly, "This little guy from the Daoless Tower is quite cautious, he even annihilated the clone and cut off my breath mark, but as long as you practice infinite resurrection, you still can't get rid of my control!"

The reason why he was still willing to create something extreme for Ye Tian was also to make Ye Tian believe it.

He didn't think that Ye Tian would really betray the Wudao Tower, he felt that Ye Tian wanted to get more benefits from him, and then he didn't really betray the Wudao Tower.

But once things develop according to his expectations, it will be impossible for Ye Tian.

"Let's practice infinite resurrection soon, little one!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord quietly looked forward to it.

......

"Infinite resurrection, very good secret art, and it's so mysterious, even if I want to practice, it's very difficult, let alone create, if I have to create, even if I give me ideas, I can't create it. "

Ye Tian muttered.

However, the other party is a perfect controller, and he is an extremely powerful existence among the perfect controllers, far from being comparable to ordinary perfect controllers, and it is not strange to be able to create such a secret technique.

In short, he made a lot of money this time!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to practice Infinite Resurrection, while another copy body went to Luopeng Valley.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian had been shuttling for twelve eternal years, and only then did he arrive at a space-time void, and then entered this space-time void, and instantly crossed a long distance, and then went to Luopeng Valley, and this time it took less than an eternal year to hurry.

On this day, Luopeng Valley has arrived!

Ye Tian entered Luopeng Valley, and immediately sensed many Realm Realm Lifeforms, these Realm Realm Life Beings were numerous, but their strength was very average.

After all, this place should be very hidden, and no half-step perfect controller has discovered it, so it is occupied by the life of the end of the world.

After Ye Tian entered here, he quickly fought with the life of the end of the realm here.

There were few powerful Realms creatures here, so he quickly killed many of the Realm's Edges creatures, and the others escaped one by one.

In the blink of an eye, it was empty!

Soon.

Ye Tian went deep into Luopeng Valley and came to the depths of Luopeng Valley, where the terrain resembled a creeping Luopeng, and Luopeng was a legendary extinct creature in the Ruins of Eternity.

"According to what the Stone Dragon Demon Lord said, the ultimate thing in Luopeng Valley is called the Golden Leaf of God Creation, and it was born on the Golden Tree of God Creation. And this kind of god-making golden tree is very special, it only appears once every ten thousand eternal years, and it is usually not perceptible at all, unless it is a top-level perfect controller who can perceive its existence. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He tried to perceive it, but he couldn't sense the existence of the Golden Tree of God Creation, so he had to wait.

Of course.

Even if the Golden Tree of God Creation appears, it is very difficult to take away the Golden Leaf of God Creation, and you must master the perfect mark of the Golden Dao before you can touch the Golden Leaf of God Creation.

This is also the reason why it is very difficult for the creatures here to take the Golden Leaf of the Gods, because they cannot reach the Golden Leaf of the Gods.

"According to the time calculation, it is probably enough to wait for more than eighty eternal years!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And then he waited here.

On the other side, Ye Tian had already practiced the secret technique of infinite resurrection.

Once this secret technique is practiced, it will really be practiced, and it will completely form one with the Mutated Perfection Grade Ancestral Immortal Resurrection, and turn into an innate instinctive ability.

In the future, it will be very difficult for the enemy to kill Ye Tian.

Of course, if it really provokes an unimaginable existence, the other party can easily find Ye Tian's entire body and kill it, even if he is reborn and can be found again in a short time, then Ye Tian will still be killed.

However, he has the Daoless Tower as a backer, so this kind of thing will not exist.

The other side.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord was also waiting, he was waiting for Ye Tian to practice infinite resurrection.

Of course, he was not in a hurry, because he knew that the secret art of infinite resurrection was difficult to practice, so it would take a long time.

Before you know it, more than eighty eternal years have passed.

this day.

The Golden Tree of God Creation was born!

Airplanes!!!!

A lot of golden light shone in the depths of Luopeng Valley, and the moment Ye Tian appeared in the Golden Tree of Creation, he immediately wrapped his hand with the perfect mark of the Golden Dao and grabbed those Golden Leaves of the Divine Creation.
